def normalize_config(config):
    result = dict(config)
    result["timeout"] = result.get("timeout", 30)
    result["retries"] = result.get("retries", 3)
    result["debug"] = result.get("debug", False)
    return result

def enrich_record(record, defaults):
    enriched = {**defaults, **record}
    enriched["processed"] = True
    return enriched

def apply_filters(query_params, valid_keys):
    return {k: v for k, v in query_params.items() if k in valid_keys}

def merge_settings(base, overrides):
    merged = {**base, **overrides, "merged": True}
    return merged
